series_metadata.series_description: Record of claims taking activities under regular Ohio Law and Title 5 of the United States Code (Federal Employees and Ex -servicemen). File contains, but is not limited to, statistical tables and reports for unemployment claims and benefit payment data of benefit recipients, unemployment insurance claims data and federally required reports as well as initial and continued claims filed by claimants for unemployment insurance benefits by county throughout the state. File also contains data that provides statistics on applicants, placements, referrals to the w orkforce service; unemployment compensation data for claimants by industry, weeks and amount of benefits; and statistical analysis reports done internally on all unemployment insurance and workforce service activities on a weekly, monthly, quarterly and annual basis; and includes claims activity and employment service data.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office ; Electronic: in office
